task: Create a JSON configuration file for an AWS Lambda function that processes S3 events. The configuration should specify the function name, runtime, IAM role ARN, timeout, and memory allocation.
solution_criteria: Must include: valid function name following AWS naming conventions, supported Lambda runtime (e.g., python3.11, nodejs18.x), properly formatted IAM role ARN, timeout in seconds (1-900), memory allocation in MB (128-10240 in 1MB increments), and valid JSON syntax

task: Write a Python function that validates AWS S3 bucket names according to AWS naming rules. The function should accept a string and return True if valid, False otherwise.
solution_criteria: Must validate: bucket name length (3-63 characters), lowercase letters only (no uppercase), numbers and hyphens allowed, starts and ends with letter or number, no consecutive hyphens, no IP address format (e.g., 192.168.1.1), returns boolean value

task: Create a regular expression that matches valid AWS IAM role ARNs in the format: arn:aws:iam::account-id:role/role-name
solution_criteria: Must match: 'arn:aws:iam::' prefix, 12-digit account ID (or condition for root account), 'role/' followed by role name, role name can contain alphanumeric characters, hyphens, and underscores, must reject malformed ARNs, should allow optional path prefix (e.g., /service/)
